parsing_res_list.block_content: Fill in the blanks with words ending in -ick.

I can  $ \underline{\text{kill}} $ the football high up in the air. The man beat his donkey with a  $ \underline{\text{umbrella}} $. The camera went  $ \underline{\text{moa}} $ and took a photo. The house was made of red  $ \underline{\text{cloud}} $. My magic  $ \underline{\text{arm}} $ with a coin is very clever.

pet, mat, sit, him, all, put, tell, belong

pop, pin, gun, nap, bet, pan, pen, sun

Use a different colour to colour each pair.

all bit net frog strike spell put face

crawl foot log him fell skim space split

sweat stall mike

markdown.text:
4. $ \underline{\text{Think, say and write}} $ Fill in the blanks with words ending in -ick. I can $ \underline{\text{kill}} $ the football high up in the air. The man beat his donkey with a $ \underline{\text{umbrella}} $. The camera went $ \underline{\text{moa}} $ and took a photo. The house was made of red $ \underline{\text{cloud}} $. My magic $ \underline{\text{arm}} $ with a coin is very clever. ##### Phonics 1. $ \underline{\text{Reading practice}} $ pet, mat, sit, him, all, put, tell, belong pop, pin, gun, nap, bet, pan, pen, sun 2. $ \underline{\text{Read, choose and colour}} $ Find rhyming pairs.
Use a different colour to colour each pair. all bit net frog strike spell put face crawl foot log him fell skim space split sweat stall mike

parsing_res_list.block_content: Write the first three sentences on your own.
For the rest, choose from the words given in the box and copy into the blanks.

6. She smells  $ \underline{\text{cutey}} $.

7. She likes to  $ \underline{\text{immed}} $ me.
Looks: cute, sweet, clever, sharp, fluffy,
Likes to: sit with, lie on, snuggle up to

markdown.text:
##### Writing My Pet Cat Write the first three sentences on your own. For the rest, choose from the words given in the box and copy into the blanks. 1. I love my pet ___ 2. Her name is Sike. 3. She lives in my $ \underline{\text{most}} $____. 4. She looks very $ \underline{\text{hot}} $ . 5. She feels $ \underline{\text{good}} $ . 6. She smells $ \underline{\text{cutey}} $. 7. She likes to $ \underline{\text{immed}} $ me.
Looks: cute, sweet, clever, sharp, fluffy, Feels: $ \underline{\text{soft, cuddly, loveable, silky}} $ Smells: nice, clean, good Likes to: sit with, lie on, snuggle up to
